answers.text: 当前围绕 Product Separator（separator-3）的两条被选中出口流生成候选编辑提案：liquid-product-5 未连接任何下游消费者（STREAM_DISCONNECTED），vapor-product-5 缺少温度规格（STREAM_SPEC_MISSING）。两条诊断均为 error 级别，求解器因拓扑无效而无法收敛。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Liquid Product 添加下游连接占位
proposed_actions.rationale: liquid-product-5 当前仅有 source_unit_id（separator-3），缺少 target_unit_id，导致 STREAM_DISCONNECTED 错误。此 patch 添加一个 connection_placeholder，提示用户指定下游单元或导出汇。由于涉及拓扑重连，风险标记为 high。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Vapor Product 补全温度规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: vapor-product-5 当前 specs 仅含 pressure_kpa=235，缺少 temperature_c，导致 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 错误。此 patch 在 specs 中添加 temperature_c 占位，默认值参考进料温度 46 °C 作为初始估计，用户应根据实际工艺条件确认或修改。

issues.message: Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Liquid Product is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Vapor Product is missing temperature specification.
